assets.alt: Frosted glass comparison panel representing founder-led and employee-generated LinkedIn content
assets.notes: Generated with the Sell In Public Liquid Mesh Hero style and copied into the post-local asset folder.

final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: wide blog hero, 1600x700. Primary request: a visual comparison of founder-led LinkedIn content and employee-generated content for a B2B company. Style reference: Sell In Public Liquid Mesh Hero style with warm Japanese-inspired blended mesh gradient, one focused liquid-glass UI object, bright white text-like lines, thin translucent strokes, soft glows, subtle grain, and calm editorial depth. Subject: a single frosted glass comparison card with two simple profile circles, text-like lines, and a shared decision toggle/checkmark area. Constraints: no logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, readable text, fake metrics, SVG/vector look, stock-photo look, dark single-hue palette, orange/blue split, flow lines, or icon cloud.
